title: The k-th Lexicographical String of All Happy Strings of Length n
titleCn: 长度为 n 的开心字符串中字典序第 k 小的字符串

testcases.input: n = 1, k = 3 Output: "c" Explanation: The list ["a", "b", "c"] contains all happy strings of length 1. The third string is "c".
testcases.expectedOutput: "c" Explanation: The list ["a", "b", "c"] contains all happy strings of length 1. The third string is "c".

testcases.input: n = 1, k = 4 Output: "" Explanation: There are only 3 happy strings of length 1.
testcases.expectedOutput: "" Explanation: There are only 3 happy strings of length 1.

testcases.input: n = 3, k = 9 Output: "cab" Explanation: There are 12 different happy string of length 3 ["aba", "abc", "aca", "acb", "bab", "bac", "bca", "bcb", "cab", "cac", "cba", "cbc"]. You will find the 9th string = "cab"
testcases.expectedOutput: "cab" Explanation: There are 12 different happy string of length 3 ["aba", "abc", "aca", "acb", "bab", "bac", "bca", "bcb", "cab", "cac", "cba", "cbc"]. You will find the 9th string = "cab
